channel_title: AI News & Strategy Daily | Nate B Jones
title: I Just Did a Full Day of Analyst Work in 10 Minutes. The $120K Job Description Just Changed Forever.
executive_summary: Nate B. Jones discusses how AI assistants like Claude are revolutionizing tools like Excel and PowerPoint, enabling tasks that previously took a full day to be completed in just 10 minutes. This shift is validated by a Goldman analyst and highlights the importance of judgment over execution skills in the evolving job market.
bullets: A Goldman analyst validated a 10-minute operating model that previously took a full day to complete. This shows how AI can drastically reduce the time needed for complex tasks, similar to how a microwave can cook food in minutes that would normally take hours in an oven.

The integration of financial data connectors from companies like Moody's and LSEG is eliminating the tedious 'terminal grind' of data analysis. This is like having a GPS that not only tells you where to go but also avoids traffic jams, making your journey smoother and faster.

The context layer between applications means Microsoft is becoming a 'dumb pipe' for data. This is like a water pipe that only delivers water but doesn't filter or enhance it, showing that the real intelligence is now in the applications using the data.

Claude in Excel and PowerPoint works by leveraging advanced AI capabilities to automate complex tasks. It's like having a highly skilled assistant who can not only follow your instructions but also anticipate your needs and suggest improvements.

The combination of Excel and PowerPoint is more powerful than either tool alone. This synergy is like a well-coordinated sports team where each player enhances the performance of the others, leading to better overall results.

The cost of implementing these AI tools is rapidly decreasing, making them more accessible. This is akin to how smartphones became cheaper over time, allowing more people to benefit from advanced technology.

Goldman, AIG, and Norway's Sovereign Wealth Fund are already using these AI tools, indicating their real-world applicability. This is like seeing a new car model being driven by top executives, signaling that it's not just a concept but a practical solution.

Workflow walkthroughs for models, decks, and due diligence are becoming streamlined with AI assistance. Imagine a factory assembly line where robots handle the repetitive tasks, allowing humans to focus on quality control and innovation.
Time savings with AI tools multiply instead of just adding up. This is like compound interest in a savings account, where the more you save, the faster your money grows over time.

Anthropic is building a context layer that enhances how AI interacts with various applications. Think of it like a translator who not only converts languages but also understands cultural nuances, making communication smoother.

The upgrade cycle for AI tools is moving at a pace that has never been seen before. It's like the rapid evolution of smartphones, where each new model brings features that were previously unimaginable.

The evaporation of execution skills means that judgment is becoming the premium skill in the workplace. This is like a chef who can create a dish from scratch versus one who can only follow a recipe; creativity and decision-making are now more valuable.
key_takeaways: Adopt the 10-minute operating model for your daily tasks to stay competitive. If you don't, you risk falling behind as others leverage AI to work faster and more efficiently.
Integrate financial data connectors into your workflow to eliminate tedious tasks. Without this, you may find yourself stuck in outdated processes while others move ahead.
Focus on developing judgment skills rather than just execution skills. If you neglect this, you may become obsolete in a job market that values critical thinking and decision-making.

technical_terms.Claude: An AI assistant that automates complex tasks in applications like Excel and PowerPoint. Think of it like a highly skilled intern who can handle multiple tasks at once, freeing up your time for strategic thinking.
technical_terms.Context Layer: A framework that enhances how AI interacts with different applications by providing relevant information. Like a smart assistant who knows your preferences and can tailor suggestions based on past interactions.
technical_terms.Financial Data Connectors: Tools that link financial data sources to applications, streamlining data analysis. Think of it like a universal remote that controls all your devices, making it easier to manage everything from one place.
technical_terms.Workflow Walkthroughs: Guided processes that help users complete tasks efficiently with the aid of AI. Like a GPS that not only gives directions but also helps you navigate through obstacles.
technical_terms.Execution Skills: The ability to carry out tasks effectively and efficiently. This is like being a skilled driver who can navigate traffic but may not know the best routes to take.
